name: InvenTrust Properties Corp.
summary: InvenTrust Properties Corp. is a Maryland corporation that operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT). The company issues common stock with a par value of $0.001 per share and engages in equity distribution activities, selling shares through an at-the-market offering program with aggregate gross sales of up to $250,000,000 under its Equity Distribution Agreement.

products.name: Common Stock
products.description: Common stock with par value $0.001 per share sold via at-the-market equity distribution program up to $250,000,000 aggregate gross sales.
